tech_news.title: Android 17 Beta 4.1 finally fixes the Pixel problems folks have been complaining about - Android Police
The Google Pixel Watch 5 may have been spoiled by… the creator of Borderlands - The Verge
tech_news.description: Borderlands creator Randy Pitchford may have just given us our first look at the Google Pixel Watch 5, as he claims his friend found what appears to be the upcoming wearable while scuba diving.

tech_news.title: 'All Systems Glow': Apple Teases WWDC 2026 With New Tagline, Playlist, Wallpapers - CNET
tech_news.description: The tagline likely hints at an iOS 27 reveal, following leaks that showcased a Siri-focused update with glowing UI elements.

tech_news.title: Is it a date? A retailer might've revealed the Google Home Speaker's launch - Android Central
tech_news.description: A retailer's online listing for the Google Home Speaker seemingly revealed its mid-June launch date.

tech_news.title: At Computex, Dell’s $700 XPS 13 Sets Its Sights on the MacBook Neo - PCMag
tech_news.description: To compete with Apple's MacBook Neo and other 'cheapium' budget laptops, Dell transforms its high-end 13-inch XPS 13 into an entry-level system for $699.99. It's pricier, but Dell's laptop has some key edges over the Neo that justify the extra cost.

tech_news.title: Sony’s new fight stick and gaming monitor launch in August - The Verge
tech_news.description: Sony says that its FlexStrike fight stick and 27-inch gaming monitor will launch in August. Launch details for its Pulse Elevate wireless speakers will come later this year.

tech_news.title: AMD Wants You To Keep Using Your Old Hardware For A Lot Longer - GameSpot
tech_news.description: With the growing cost of PC hardware and no defined end in sight, AMD is leveraging older hardware and promising extended support of existing platforms as its business strategy for the foreseeable future. AMD made a variety of announcements at Computex, but t…

tech_news.title: ROG XBOX Ally X20 Bundle – 20th Anniversary OLED Handheld - ASUS Pressroom
tech_news.description: Discover the all-new ROG XBOX Ally X20 Bundle with a stunning 7.4" OLED Nebula HDR display, AMD Ryzen AI Z2 Extreme, and ROG XREAL R1 Edition 20 AR Glasses. Celebrate 20 years of ROG with the ultimate portable gaming setup.

tech_news.title: Marathon’s Season 2 Launch And Free Week Is A Hugely Important Test - Forbes
tech_news.description: Marathon is trying to boost its playercount with a new season and a free week to try the game out. It needs to work.
